title: Brewery drinks
description: add unique texture for each drink from the plugin Brewery
body:
### add unique texture for each drink from the plugin Brewery
_may have problems with absinthe, green absinthe and potato soup cause i couldn't test them_
### needs [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versionrk) or optifine to work

### inspired by [Cuboids](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cuboids-resource-pack/)
